description: Design a 3D bottle shape using GeoGebra that meets specific engineering constraints. Create a rotationally symmetric bottle with a height of exactly 15 cm and an internal volume of 500 ml (± 5 ml). The project must include a profile function r(x) defining the radius along the height (x-axis from 0 to 15), a 3D visualization of the surface of revolution, and a dynamic volume calculation based on the disk method integral. Save the project as 'bottle_design.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/. Note: 1 ml = 1 cubic cm; units in GeoGebra are treated as cm.
